messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a Patient aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve using discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw a typed DomainError when admitting an already-admitted patient.
Write a Decider for a Prescription aggregate covering prescribe, refill, and cancel. Refilling a cancelled prescription must throw. Include an exhaustive evolve with a never default.
Explain briefly how a Decider works, then show a typed LabOrder Decider in TypeScript with place/collect/result/cancel commands.
Implement a Decider for a VisitRecord aggregate with start, addNote, sign, and amend commands. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, typed DomainError, exhaustive never defaults.
Build a pure Decider for a TreatmentPlan aggregate in TypeScript with draft/approve/activate/complete transitions. Use discriminated unions and throw typed errors.
Refactor this inline ConsentForm decider into a named Decider export with a discriminated union State and typed DomainError. Keep commands: grant, revoke, expire.
What's the v5 way to fold a Patient event stream into a denormalised admissions dashboard view? Show a minimal project function and empty view.
Build a read-model projection that tracks Formulary drug-coverage status in TypeScript. Ignore events unrelated to the view and return it unchanged.
Explain briefly what a projection is versus an aggregate's evolve, then show a minimal ClinicalTrial enrolment projection in TypeScript.
Write a minimal LabOrder turnaround-time projection in TypeScript. Track placed/resulted timestamps and computed durations, denormalised by order id.
Show a versioned Snapshot loader for a Prescription aggregate in TypeScript. Include a CURRENT_VERSION constant and at least two upgrader functions (v1->v2, v2->v3).
Implement a Snapshot helper for ClinicalTrial state in TypeScript. Include CURRENT_VERSION, two upgraders, and a loadSnapshot path that reconstructs state from a snapshot plus a tail of events.
What's the v5 way to add a snapshot upgrader to an existing VisitRecord decider? Show a minimal example with two version transitions.
Build an appendToStream wrapper for a Patient aggregate using optimistic concurrency with expectedRevision. Surface a typed ConcurrencyConflict on mismatch.
How do I implement optimistic concurrency for a Prescription aggregate using Effect.gen around an EventStoreDB-like client? Show a typed Effect pipeline.
Add optimistic-concurrency retry to this LabOrder append helper in TypeScript. Reload state and retry up to three times when the store reports a conflict.
Build a CommandHandler for a Patient aggregate in TypeScript that loads events, calls decide, and appends with expectedRevision. Use a local EventStore interface; no external SDK types.
Write a CommandHandler over an EventStore for a Prescription aggregate in TypeScript. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, expectedRevision-aware, no business logic in the handler.
Build a CommandHandler for a Dispense aggregate wrapped in Effect.gen. Load, decide, append with expectedRevision. Local EventStore interface only.
Show the v5 way to structure a generic handleCommand function that takes a Decider and an EventStore. Brief example with a Procedure aggregate.
Write a resumable subscription runner for a Formulary projection in TypeScript. Use a CheckpointStore interface and persist the checkpoint after each event is projected.
How do I wire a crash-safe subscription for LabOrder events in TypeScript? Persist the projection, then the checkpoint — never the reverse.
Add checkpointing to this ClinicalTrial subscription using an Effect.gen loop. Constraint: persist view before checkpoint, resume from last position.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper in TypeScript that folds an AsyncIterable of events into an aggregate state using a provided evolve. Use it with a Patient evolve.
Write a when/aggregate helper for a VisitRecord event stream in TypeScript. Use a discriminated Event union and an exhaustive never default.
What's the v5 way to aggregate a stream with an async iterable, using aggregateStream plus a Symptom evolve? Brief minimal example.
Explain briefly why `when` reducers must stay pure in event-sourcing, then implement a Procedure when reducer with exhaustive matching.
Show the v5 equivalent of an `upcast` function for legacy Prescription events where v1 used `refills` and v2 renamed it to `refillCount`. Brief example with UnknownEventError.
Implement upcasting for a LabOrder event stream in TypeScript. v1 events used `orderNo` + `test`; v2 uses `id` + `panel`. Throw UnknownEventError on unmatched input.
Write a chunked read-model rebuild function for a Patient admissions projection in TypeScript. Accept a `from` cursor and a batchSize; persist after each batch.
Build a resumable rebuild loop for a Formulary projection in TypeScript. Constraint: report progress via a callback; support resume from a prior cursor after a crash.

Write a CQRS boundary in TypeScript for a TreatmentPlan aggregate. handleCommand goes through a Decider and EventStore; queryView reads from a read store. Comment that the read store is eventually consistent.
Explain briefly how CQRS splits writes from reads, then show a minimal TypeScript Procedure CQRS with handleCommand and queryView. The sides must not share a state type.
Write a Process Manager skeleton for a LabOrder -> Dispense saga in TypeScript. React to LabOrderResulted by emitting a QueueDispense command. Return null when the event is irrelevant.
Implement a stateful saga for a ClinicalTrial enrolment workflow in TypeScript: ParticipantScreened -> RequestConsent -> ConsentGranted -> Enrol. Pure (state, event) => { nextState, command? }.
Write a translate function for Prescription integration events in TypeScript. Map domain events to versioned integration payloads; map private domain events to null.

Build an outbox appender for VisitRecord events in TypeScript. One unit of work inserts outbox rows and appends to the stream. Use a local transactional interface; add a comment about the publisher's role.
Fix this TypeScript snippet: the snapshot loader does not validate the upgraded state and lets stale versions through. Show a corrected Formulary snapshot loader with strict versioning.
How do I wrap a Patient CommandHandler in Effect for retry on concurrency conflict? Show a minimal Effect.gen example.
Build an integration-event translator + outbox appender for Patient events in TypeScript. translate maps domain to IntegrationEvent | null; appendWithOutbox writes both in one transaction.
Add a typed Snapshot + CommandHandler combo for a Formulary aggregate in TypeScript. Load snapshot, apply tail of events, decide, append with expectedRevision.
Explain briefly the difference between aggregate evolve and projection project, then show a Symptom aggregateStream that uses when and reduces to an aggregate state.
